overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a spacesuit exploring a snowy, rocky alien mountain terrain at night. The character uses a flashlight to navigate steep slopes and approaches a cave entrance, with distant smoke visible on the horizon.

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky snow-covered slope, using hands to navigate the steep terrain

entered.detail: steep incline covered in snow and ice, illuminated by the character's flashlight
tall jagged rock face forming the left boundary of the slope
tall jagged rock face forming the right boundary of the slope

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep snow-covered mountain slope at night, illuminated only by their helmet flashlight. The terrain is rugged with rocky outcrops visible on both sides as the character climbs steadily upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with distant atmospheric effects

events.description: character raises both hands to helmet, appearing to activate a scanner or binoculars to survey the area
dark smoke or dust plumes become visible rising in the distance against the night sky

agents.ego_description: pausing at the ridge crest to scan the horizon with a handheld device, observing distant smoke plumes

entered.detail: dark smoke rising from behind the distant mountain ridge, suggesting a fire or industrial activity
prominent rock formation at the ridge top providing a vantage point

segments.scene_description: Upon reaching the ridge crest, the character pauses to scan the horizon, revealing distant smoke plumes against the starry sky. The character uses a scanning device while standing near a large boulder, surveying the vast alien landscape before proceeding.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow valley with scattered rock formations

events.description: character jumps down from a ledge, landing in a lower elevation valley area

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the mountain slope, jumping down ledges and navigating through scattered boulders

entered.detail: field of small to medium boulders scattered across the snow-covered valley floor
dark opening between rock formations visible in the distance, partially illuminated

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the ridge into a wide valley dotted with scattered rocks and boulders. In the distance, a dark cave entrance becomes visible between the rock formations as the character navigates the uneven snow-covered terrain.

events.description: character approaches the dark cave entrance between two large rock walls

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cave entrance while sweeping the flashlight across the rocky walls, preparing to enter the darker interior

entered.detail: tall rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage leading to the cave
tall rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage leading to the cave

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky canyon with walls closing in on both sides, approaching the dark cave entrance. The flashlight illuminates the textured rock surfaces as the character moves closer to the cave, transitioning from the open valley into the confined passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a rugged mountain peak and descends into a confined rocky canyon. It begins with a steady climb up a steep, snow-covered slope, where the helmet flashlight cuts through the night to reveal jagged rocky outcrops. As the character reaches the ridge crest, the perspective opens to a vast alien landscape under a starry sky, pausing briefly to scan distant smoke plumes from beside a large boulder. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the heights into a wide, boulder-strewn valley, navigating the uneven snow toward a distant dark opening. Finally, the open terrain narrows into a tight rocky canyon with closing walls, where the flashlight illuminates textured stone surfaces as the character moves deeper into the mouth of a cave.
